news.t: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
Here are the top-performing ETFs in first half of 2023 as crypto-related funds soar

holdings.infoBox: CRPT is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are Strategy stock at 18.09%, Ft Sky Crypt Cym 1002063 at 18.02%, Galaxy Digital at 15.52%, Coinbase Global at 10.82%, and Strive at 9.91%.

overview.description: The First Trust SkyBridge Crypto Industry & Digital Economy ETF (CRPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund actively invests in companies supporting the crypto industry and the digital economy around the world. CRPT was launched on Sep 20, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
data.text: Bitcoin gained 12.7% in April, registering back-to-back monthly gains and its best month since April 2025. The run was driven by leveraged trading activity in the derivatives market while demand for t...

data.title: Here are the top-performing ETFs in first half of 2023 as crypto-related funds soar
data.text: Hello! This week's ETF Wrap looks at top performers in the first half of 2023, as well as flows, as stocks rally and crypto-related funds jump so far this year.
